description_long: This object consists of three brown, wrinkled, and roughly spherical fruits clustered tightly together. The surface is deeply grooved and textured, with a matte, woody appearance reminiscent of a walnut shell. Each fruit is slightly asymmetrical, with natural indentations and ridges running from top to bottom. The coloration is a consistent medium to dark brown, with subtle variations in shading that accentuate the rugged surface. There are no visible stems or leaves attached to any of the fruits. The overall grouping suggests these fruits are in direct contact, forming a compact cluster.
description: A cluster of three brown, wrinkled, and grooved fruits with a hard, matte surface and no visible stems or leaves.
description_view_0: Three brown, wrinkled fruits are clustered together, with the top fruit prominently visible and the lower two partially obscured.
description_view_1: The top fruit is centered and elevated, while the two lower fruits are more fully visible and spread out at the base.
description_view_2: The cluster is seen from a side angle, highlighting the deep grooves and the close contact between all three fruits.
description_view_3: The top fruit is most prominent, with the lower two fruits forming a base, all showing their textured, brown surfaces.
